track_a_candidates.assumption_broken: Training data is centralized and can be pooled before training.
track_a_candidates.innovation_direction: Federated organ segmentation for cross-hospital deployment
track_a_candidates.real_world_motivation: Hospitals often cannot share raw scans because of privacy and governance constraints, but they still need a model that learns across sites.
track_a_candidates.new_problem_formulation: Train a segmentation model collaboratively across multiple institutions without centralizing the raw imaging data.
track_a_candidates.core_technical_challenge: Handle client drift, annotation heterogeneity, and communication-efficient optimization without losing spatial accuracy.
track_a_candidates.candidate_title: Federated Multi-Organ Segmentation Across Heterogeneous Hospitals
novelty_search_queries: federated medical image segmentation cross hospital

track_b_candidates.principle_being_transferred: Selective early fusion improves dense prediction more than uniform deep fusion.
track_b_candidates.transfer_justification: Both tasks require precise boundary recovery under a multi-scale hierarchy, and excessive late-stage global mixing can blur the structures that matter.
track_b_candidates.innovation_direction: Selective early fusion for temporal boundary detection in videos
track_b_candidates.real_world_motivation: Temporal boundary detectors need precise transition localization, and late heavy context fusion may smooth away the cues that define short events.
track_b_candidates.new_problem_formulation: Detect temporal boundaries while prioritizing early high-resolution feature fusion and constraining late-stage global mixing.
track_b_candidates.core_technical_challenge: Preserve temporal precision while still modeling enough long-range context to avoid fragmented detections.
track_b_candidates.candidate_title: Selective Early Fusion for Precise Temporal Boundary Detection in Video
novelty_search_queries: video temporal boundary detection fusion transformer
temporal action boundary detection multi scale fusion
dense video boundary detection attention fusion
principle_level_search_queries: selective early fusion temporal boundary detection
limited late fusion precise video boundary detection
reduced global mixing dense video prediction
